modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log in to B-Line system for nursing.

full_description_text:  
While attempting to access the B-Line system for nursing, I encountered an error that prevented me from signing in. This issue arose during a routine check of patient records, which is critical for my daily tasks. I have ensured that my credentials are correct, but the system continues to reject my login attempts. This situation is causing delays in my workflow and needs urgent attention.
short_description: Unable to log in to B-Line system for nursing.
